# Karnex

> Karnex is an AI-powered smart co-founder for Iranian startups. It helps founders build a business model canvas, execution roadmap, pitch deck, and project-aware AI copilot — from idea to investor-ready materials.

## Key Sections

- [Home](/): Product story and pricing
- [About](/about): Mission and focus
- [Help](/help): Getting started and FAQ (public)
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro (plus), Team (pro) plans with weighted AI credits
- [Contact](/contact): Support
- [Terms](/terms) · [Privacy](/privacy)

## Product (logged-in)

- Genesis wizard → Startup path
- Dashboard: overview, roadmap, canvas, pitch deck, validation, growth, competitors, copilot
- Payments via Zibal (IRR)

## Notes for crawlers

- Primary language: Persian (fa-IR), RTL
- Launch focus: startups first; traditional/creator paths coming soon
- AI outputs are advisory; users should verify critical decisions
